name: han
description: Han's skill set: self-learning skill factory + image generation (han-imagen) + infographic (han-infographic).

interface.longDescription: Han's Codex skill collection. Ships skill-creator-plus (self-learning skill factory), han-imagen (image generation engine, OpenAI/Google), and han-infographic (infographic with anti-hallucination two-phase flow + self-learning).
defaultPrompt: Create a self-learning skill with a feedback loop
Split a bloated SKILL.md into on-demand files
Add self-learning to an existing skill
Generate an infographic from an article
Draw / generate an image (OpenAI or Google)
